name: Vintage Four Color
description: A nostalgic, vintage comic book style reminiscent of 1940s–50s adventure comics, characterized by bold linework, flat colors, and a limited color palette, designed to evoke nostalgia while maintaining clarity and readability.

art_style.line_styles: Thick, uniform outlines (3–4 pt) around characters and major objects, with thinner lines (1–2 pt) for facial details and textures. Minimal cross-hatching replaced by clusters of short parallel strokes for texture, maintaining ample negative space.
art_style.inking_tools: Digital brush for consistent line thickness.
art_style.shading_style: Flat fills with no gradients; 15% dot-pattern halftone for shadows with crisp edges. Spot blacks used sparingly for silhouettes and folds.
art_style.color_palette: Limited four-color scheme: dusty teal, sea‑green, mustard‑yellow, tomato‑red, clay‑brown, and powder‑blue. Thick black contour lines, single flat fill + one darker shadow tone, light halftone texture.
art_style.registration: No panel borders.   ocassional mis-registration of color fills by 1 pt.
art_style.lettering_style: hand-lettered sans-serif; uniform stroke width matching line weight, tight kerning for legibility.

character_style.head_to_body_ratio: 1:5 for expressive faces, with tapered limbs.
character_style.limb_proportions: Wider at shoulders/hips, narrower at hands/feet.
character_style.anatomy_detail: Simplified features, simple oval eyes, and single curved line mouths. Bold silhouettes for hair and clothing, avoiding fractal details.
character_style.eye_style: Simple ovals with a highlight dot.
character_style.nose_style: Minimal detail, integrated into the overall silhouette.
character_style.expression_exaggeration: Clear, exaggerated body language with distinct ‘C’ and ‘S’ curves for readability.
character_style.silhouette_clarity: Black silhouettes that are distinct and recognizable against backgrounds.
character_style.silhouette_shape_language: Bold and rounded shapes for characters.
character_style.detail_complexity: Minimal detail, focusing on clean lines and clear forms.
character_style.texture_accents: Subtle texture accents like simple patterns on clothing or hair for added visual interest.
character_style.motion_line_style: Occasional use of dynamic motion lines to convey action or excitement, particularly in movement scenes.
character_style.expression_line_style: Simple accent lines for sweat drops or stress lines to enhance emotional moments, keeping in line with the whimsical tone.

chat.shape: Smooth, oval shapes with a pointed tail, matching contour line thickness.

whisper.shape: Smooth, oval shapes with a pointed tail.

shout.shape: Smooth, oval shapes with a pointed tail.

thought.shape: Cloud shaped bubble with a pointed tail.

sound_effect.shape: Oval, with broken border described below
sound_effect.border: short, thin, motion lines radiating away from the text, with single line to the sourse of the sound.
